title: Medical device safety and use in vision and dental care - Canada.ca
content:
## Vision and dental care
There are medical devices used to monitor, improve and care for our eyes and mouth. Who uses them and how long they're used depends on the type of device.
Read more about some types of devices used in vision and dental care.
About laser eye surgery, common laser procedures, benefits and risks, minimizing your risk, Health Canada's role
About contact lenses, types of contact lenses, minimizing your risk, Health Canada's role
About Health Canada's position on dental amalgam, potential risk of negative health effects from mercury
